title: Iron Hammer
description: This mod adds 6 new hammers that function like pickaxes — but with the ability to mine in a 3×3 area.
body:
This mod adds **6 new hammers** that function like pickaxes — but with the ability to mine in a **3×3 area**.

---

### Added Hammers

* Wooden Hammer
* Stone Hammer
* Iron Hammer
* Golden Hammer
* Diamond Hammer
* Netherite Hammer

Each hammer corresponds to its vanilla tier and follows the same progression in durability, mining speed, and effectiveness.

---

### Functionality

All hammers:

* Work like pickaxes
* Can mine ores and stone-based blocks
* Break blocks in a **3×3 area** instead of a single block

---

### Overall Concept

The mod enhances mining efficiency by introducing tier-based tools that:

* Maintain vanilla balance
* Speed up resource gathering
* Reduce repetitive mining

Mining becomes faster and more practical without changing the core gameplay progression.
